# @sargonpiraev/seokit

[![npm version](https://img.shields.io/npm/v/@sargonpiraev%2fseokit)](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@sargonpiraev%2fseokit)

[![skills.sh](https://skills.sh/b/sargonpiraev/seokit)](https://skills.sh/sargonpiraev/seokit)

Playwright SEO matchers for Next.js + next-intl apps

## Install

```bash
npm install @sargonpiraev/seokit @playwright/test
```

## Skill (optional)

For Cursor and other coding agents. [Skill docs](https://sargonpiraev.github.io/seokit/docs/skill).

**skills.sh**

```bash
npx skills add https://github.com/sargonpiraev/seokit/tree/main/packages/seokit/skills/seokit -a cursor -y
```

**skills-npm** (version-locked)

```bash
npm i -D skills-npm
npx skills-npm setup
npm install @sargonpiraev/seokit
```
